sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Netflix Results to Shine Light on Fundamentals Amid Warner Fight
feed.summary: Netflix is set to report earnings, with investors focused on the company's fundamentals amidst its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. The streaming giant's past earnings report led to a significant stock selloff due to concerns about slowing subscriber growth. While some investors are wary of the Warner Bros. deal's cost and risks, others see the current stock dip as a buying opportunity, emphasizing Netflix's core business strength and potential for future growth.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Stock Position Boosted by Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC increased its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 3.2% to 65,000 shares, making it the 8th largest position in their portfolio. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Procyon Advisors LLC also significantly increased their holdings. Parker-Hannifin recently beat earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $7.22 and revenue of $5.08 billion, and has provided strong FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Pennsylvania American Water Asks Customers in 21 Counties to Reduce Nonessential Water Use During Drought Watch Declaration
feed.summary: Pennsylvania American Water is asking customers in 21 counties to voluntarily reduce nonessential water use by 10-15% following the Pennsylvania DEP's expanded drought watch declaration. This request comes as a precautionary measure, even though current water supplies are adequate, to prepare for potentially more severe conditions. The company provides tips for water conservation and highlights resources available to customers.

feed.title: Uber CEO Warns The 'Biggest Factor' In AV Growth Is Affordability, As Significant Scaling Could Take 10-20 Years
feed.summary: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi stated that affordability is the biggest factor influencing the growth of autonomous vehicles, with significant scaling potentially taking 10 to 20 years, especially outside high-fare markets. He noted current high costs and limited computing capacity as challenges but expressed confidence in the long-term safety and economic disruption potential of self-driving technology. Uber continues to invest in AV development through partnerships and its robotaxi service, reflected in a positive stock response to new AI platforms.

feed.title: Pfizer Cashes In ViiV Stake With Shionogi Sale For $1.88bn
feed.summary: Pfizer has sold its remaining stake in ViiV Healthcare, a joint venture with GSK, to Shionogi for $1.88 billion. This move allows Pfizer to cash in on its investment in the HIV drug development company. The article also mentions related companies and additional topics pertinent to the pharmaceutical industry.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) to Report Q4 2025 Financial Results on February 3, 2026
feed.summary: Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) is scheduled to report its Q4 2025 financial results on February 3, 2026, before market open, followed by a webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET. The article also provides analyst views on IT stock, with an average 1-year price target of $273.86, noting recent adjustments from UBS, Morgan Stanley, BMO Capital, and Goldman Sachs. Gartner delivers objective insights to executives through its Research, Conferences, and Consulting segments.

feed.title: General Motors Reports 6% Sales Growth in 2025, Leading Full-Size Pickup Market for Six Consecutive Years
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) reported a 6% sales increase in 2025, maintaining its leadership in the U.S. auto market and the full-size pickup segment for the sixth consecutive year. All four GM brands experienced growth, with GMC setting a new sales record and Cadillac achieving its best sales in a decade. The company also strategically focused on entry-level vehicles, selling nearly 700,000 Chevrolet and Buick models under $30,000 to attract new buyers.

feed.title: DigitalOcean appoints Oracle Cloud veteran as chief product officer
feed.summary: DigitalOcean Holdings Inc. has appointed Vinay Kumar, an Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) veteran, as its new Chief Product and Technology Officer. Kumar will lead the company's product strategy, development, cloud infrastructure, and security operations, focusing on expanding its AI inference cloud and core cloud offerings. This strategic hire aligns with DigitalOcean's continued profitability, strong revenue, and recent advancements in its AI capabilities and partnerships.

feed.title: OpenAI powers ServiceNow voice agents to handle complex office work
feed.summary: ServiceNow and OpenAI have announced an enhanced strategic collaboration to integrate OpenAI's frontier models into ServiceNow's AI platform, aiming to accelerate enterprise AI outcomes. This partnership will enable direct customer access to advanced AI capabilities, including real-time speech-to-speech voice agents and enhanced automation, without requiring bespoke development. The collaboration focuses on delivering secure, scalable agentic AI experiences to help enterprises manage complex workflows and drive measurable results.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp surpasses Q4 forecasts as net income jumps 20%
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp reported better-than-expected results for the fourth quarter, with its net income increasing by 20%. This financial performance indicates a strong close to the year for the banking institution.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace declares 12 cent dividend on common stock
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of 12 cents per share, marking its fifth consecutive year of dividend increases, with a 50% growth over the past year. The company, which specializes in engineered solutions for aerospace and transportation, also recently acquired Stanley Black & Decker's Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing business for $1.8 billion and priced a $500 million public offering of notes. Analysts have raised price targets for HWM, citing strong growth and market performance.

feed.title: Hasbro appoints former Nintendo and Honest Company execs to board
feed.summary: Hasbro, Inc. has expanded its Board of Directors by appointing Doug Bowser, former President and COO of Nintendo of America, and Carla Vernón, CEO of The Honest Company. Bowser brings over a decade of experience from Nintendo and previous roles at Electronic Arts and Procter & Gamble, while Vernón adds her expertise from Amazon and General Mills. These appointments are intended to support Hasbro's "Playing To Win" strategy and leverage their extensive leadership in consumer brands and franchise management.

feed.title: Corteva launches new fungicide for Canadian wheat growers
feed.summary: Corteva Agriscience (NYSE:CTVA) has introduced Telbek PRO, a new fungicide for Canadian wheat growers, designed to combat Fusarium head blight and late-season leaf diseases. This product, featuring a novel active ingredient for Canadian cereal growers, aims to improve yield stability and grain quality while delaying resistance development. The launch follows strong third-quarter earnings for Corteva and a new multi-million-dollar joint venture with Hexagon Bio for crop protection solutions.

feed.title: Paychex expands board, appoints former Cintas CFO Hansen as director
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. has appointed J. Michael Hansen, former CFO of Cintas Corporation, as an independent director, expanding its Board from 10 to 11 members. Hansen brings significant financial expertise, having served at Cintas for over 30 years, and will join Paychex's Audit Committee. This appointment follows Hansen's retirement from Cintas in May 2025 and his previous board service at Paycor HCM, Inc., which Paychex acquired in 2025.

feed.title: GSK to retain majority stake in ViiV Healthcare as Pfizer exits and Shionogi increases share
feed.summary: GSK announced an agreement to restructure the shareholding of ViiV Healthcare. Pfizer will exit its 11.7% economic interest, which will be acquired by Shionogi, increasing Shionogi's total stake to 21.7%. GSK will maintain its majority holding of 78.3% in ViiV Healthcare.

feed.title: The Truth About Rollins Inc: Why Wall Street Is Quietly Obsessed
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. (ROL) is a pest control company gaining quiet attention on Wall Street, despite not being a trendy social media presence. The article highlights its steady stock performance, resilient recurring revenue business model, and premium valuation. Rollins operates in a stable, essential service industry, making it an attractive long-term investment for those seeking consistent compounding rather than volatile, high-growth stocks.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma Files Provisional Patent Application for Industry-First Sublingual Formulation of Alprazolam - Generic Xanax(R) - for Rapid Anxiety Relief
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc. has filed a provisional patent application for a sublingual powder formulation of alprazolam, the active ingredient in Xanax, aimed at providing rapid anxiety relief. This new delivery system is designed to bypass the digestive system, significantly accelerating the onset of action compared to traditional oral tablets. The company plans a Phase 1 clinical trial for mid-2026, targeting patients requiring immediate relief from acute panic attacks or severe anxiety, including those with dysphagia.

feed.title: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc Notification of Relevant Change to Significant Shareholder
feed.summary: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc announced that it received notification from BlackRock, Inc. regarding a significant change in its shareholding. BlackRock, Inc. crossed a notification threshold on January 15, 2026, and reported a total voting rights position of 5.81%, reflecting both direct shares and financial instruments. The notification includes a detailed breakdown of BlackRock's holdings and the extensive chain of controlled undertakings through which these voting rights are held.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Given New $370.00 Price Target at Rosenblatt Securities
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities has raised its price target for Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) from $270.00 to $370.00, reiterating a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 13.42% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have also increased their price targets for Seagate, with the stock currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $324.74.

feed.title: Inseego and AT&T Deliver Fixed Wireless Access for Businesses with the Inseego Wavemaker FX4200
feed.summary: Inseego Corp. and AT&T Business have partnered to offer the Inseego Wavemaker FX4200, a new 5G Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) device designed for businesses. This collaboration aims to provide a powerful, easy-to-deploy, and simple-to-manage 5G connectivity solution for AT&T Business customers, suitable for various organizational needs without on-site IT. The FX4200 features Wi-Fi 7, 5G capabilities, battery backup, and enterprise-grade security, making it a robust solution for enhancing business networks.

feed.title: Chipotle (NYSE: CMG) Stock Price Prediction and Forecast 2026-2030 (Jan 2025)
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) is projected to see strong stock upside through the end of the decade despite recent challenges like inflation and fluctuating food costs. The company's growth strategy includes international expansion, enhancing digital platforms, and optimizing costs. 24/7 Wall St. forecasts Chipotle's stock price to reach $73.37 by 2030, representing an 83.6% cumulative gain, driven by continued innovation and market penetration.

feed.title: Truist Financial Lowers AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Price Target to $203.00
feed.summary: Truist Financial has decreased its price target for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) to $203.00 from $205.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target suggests an 11.25% potential upside from the stock's previous closing price. Other firms like UBS Group, BNP Paribas Exane, Colliers Securities, Royal Bank Of Canada, and Morgan Stanley have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for AVB, resulting in an average "Hold" rating and an average target price of $205.75 for the company.

feed.title: HSBC Begins Coverage on Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A)
feed.summary: HSBC has initiated coverage on Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) with a "buy" rating and a $180.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 28.86%. This follows similar positive ratings and price target increases from other firms including Wall Street Zen, JPMorgan Chase & Co., Barclays, and Robert W. Baird. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has provided optimistic guidance for Q1 and FY 2026.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza's (DPZ) Equal Weight Rating Reiterated at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reiterated an "Equal Weight" rating on Domino's Pizza (DPZ) but lowered its price target to $455 from $535, suggesting a 13.67% upside from its previous close. Despite this, the consensus rating for DPZ among analysts is "Hold" with an average target of $482.78. The stock opened at $400.28 and was trading down approximately 2.2%, with institutional investors holding a significant portion of its shares.

feed.title: BofA Securities Maintains L3Harris Technologies(LHX.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $400
feed.summary: BofA Securities analyst Ronald Epstein has reiterated a Buy rating for L3Harris Technologies (LHX.US) and maintained its target price at $400. According to TipRanks data, Ronald Epstein has a 70.8% success rate and an average return of 22.9% over the past year. TipRanks provides analysis data from financial analysts, calculating success rates and average returns based on virtual portfolio performance.

feed.title: Hasbro Announces Additions to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Hasbro, Inc. has appointed Doug Bowser, former President and COO of Nintendo of America, and Carla Vernón, CEO of The Honest Company, to its Board of Directors. These appointments are expected to bring extensive leadership experience in consumer brands and franchise management to Hasbro, aiding its long-term innovation and growth strategies. Both Bowser and Vernón have impressive track records in expanding and transforming major companies within the gaming and consumer goods industries.

feed.title: Should You Be Excited for Regeneron (REGN)?
feed.summary: Longleaf Partners Fund highlighted Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) in its Q4 2025 investor letter, noting its strong position in allergic diseases and oncology despite a focus on EYLEA by the market. The firm sees value in Regeneron's net cash balance sheet, share repurchases, and pipeline, believing its P/V ratio remains low. While acknowledging Regeneron's potential, Insider Monkey suggests that some AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: MMM Earnings: 3M Company Stock Sinks despite ‘Growth Above Macro’ in 2025
feed.summary: Shares of 3M Company (MMM) fell approximately 5% after its Q4 2025 earnings report showed uneven performance. While revenue of $6.13 billion exceeded expectations, EPS of $1.07 missed the Wall Street estimate of $1.80. CEO William Brown noted that the company achieved "growth above macro" for the year.

feed.title: Jabil invests in EHT Semi for semiconductor manufacturing power systems
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has announced a strategic minority investment and manufacturing collaboration with EHT Semi, a company specializing in RF and pulsed-power systems for semiconductor manufacturing. This partnership aims to combine Jabil's manufacturing capabilities with EHT Semi's power delivery technologies to address challenges in advanced semiconductor fabrication. The collaboration builds on Jabil's recent acquisitions and is expected to help EHT Semi scale and meet global manufacturing standards for semiconductor leaders.

feed.title: AmeriServ Financial reports 62% earnings growth in Q4 2025
feed.summary: AmeriServ Financial (NASDAQ:ASRV) reported strong financial results for Q4 2025, with net income increasing by 62.2% to $1.44 million, or $0.09 per diluted share. For the full year 2025, net income rose by 55.8% to $5.61 million, or $0.34 per diluted share, driven by a significant increase in net interest income and an expanded net interest margin. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share, and its stock appears undervalued based on its price-to-book ratio and InvestingPro's Fair Value assessment.

feed.title: AIG commits up to $3.5 billion in strategic partnership with CVC
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) has entered a strategic partnership with CVC, committing up to $3.5 billion across credit strategies and private equity secondaries. This collaboration includes AIG serving as a cornerstone investor in CVC's new private equity secondaries evergreen platform and allocating funds to separately managed accounts. The partnership aims to help AIG manage its legacy private equity exposures and access diversified private and liquid credit strategies through CVC's global investment capabilities.

feed.title: A new 5G router from AT&T and Inseego targets easier business internet
feed.summary: Inseego and AT&T Business have partnered to launch the Inseego Wavemaker FX4200, a new 5G fixed wireless access (FWA) device designed to simplify internet connectivity for businesses. The FX4200, available through AT&T Business, features Wi-Fi 7, robust security, and an 8+ hour battery backup, making it suitable for locations without dedicated IT staff. This collaboration aims to bridge the gap between complex wireline solutions and basic FWA, expanding Inseego's FWA partnerships and enhancing AT&T's business internet offerings.

feed.title: I used to joke about T-Mobile's network — now I use it more than AT&T
feed.summary: The author, a long-time AT&T Wireless user, has shifted primary smartphone testing to T-Mobile due to significant recent improvements in its 5G network coverage and speeds, partly thanks to the Sprint acquisition. T-Mobile also offers greater device flexibility compared to AT&T's restrictive whitelisting policy. While pricing can be complex, the author found T-Mobile to be more cost-effective for their multi-device usage, recommending that others investigate carrier options to potentially save money.

feed.title: PTC's Onshape Selected by Reditus Space to Accelerate Development of Reusable Orbital Reentry Capsule
feed.summary: PTC's cloud-native Onshape CAD and PDM platform has been selected by Reditus Space to accelerate the development of its reusable orbital reentry capsule. Reditus Space, which aims to provide sustainable microgravity access, transitioned from the Onshape Startup Program to Onshape Government to meet ITAR and EAR requirements. This move will support the rapid iteration and secure collaboration needed for their ENOS Mk1 mission, scheduled for launch in July 2026.

feed.title: Fast-track to orbit: Reditus' reusable capsule built with PTC's cloud CAD
feed.summary: PTC announced that Reditus Space selected its cloud-native Onshape CAD and PDM platform to accelerate the development of its reusable orbital reentry capsule, ENOS Mk1. Reditus, initially part of the Onshape Startup Program, transitioned to Onshape Government to comply with ITAR/EAR regulations for its mission. The ENOS Mk1 is scheduled for launch in July 2026 via a SpaceX Falcon 9, designed to carry commercial payloads, orbit for approximately eight weeks, and then return for reuse, showcasing the benefits of cloud-native design tools for rapid iteration and regulatory readiness in the aerospace sector.

feed.title: Paychex Expands Board of Directors, Appoints New Member
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. announced the expansion of its Board of Directors to 11 members and the appointment of J. Michael Hansen as an independent director. Mr. Hansen, formerly EVP & CFO of Cintas Corporation, brings extensive financial expertise and previously served on the board of Paycor HCM. His appointment is effective immediately, and he will serve on the Board’s Audit Committee.

feed.title: Investors to collect $0.12 a share as Howmet Aerospace declares dividend
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE: HWM) has declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per share on its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 25, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of the close of business on February 6, 2026. This move provides a direct cash return to the company's shareholders.

feed.title: Integrated Quantum Technologies Appoints Former Equifax Leader Jeremy Samuelson as EVP, Artificial Intelligence and Innovation
feed.summary: Integrated Quantum Technologies has appointed Jeremy Samuelson, former Equifax leader, as EVP, Artificial Intelligence and Innovation. He will lead the development and commercialization of the AIQu platform and VEIL technology, focusing on privacy-preserving AI and data protection. This strategic hire aims to address critical enterprise challenges in AI adoption, including privacy, regulatory compliance, and post-quantum risks, leveraging Samuelson's nearly two decades of experience in AI and data science across regulated industries.

feed.title: A longtime Cintas CFO just took a board seat at Paychex
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. has expanded its Board of Directors to 11 members and appointed J. Michael Hansen, former Executive Vice President & CFO of Cintas Corporation, as an independent director. Hansen brings extensive financial expertise from his 30-year tenure at Cintas and prior experience with Ernst & Young and Rockwell Corporation. His appointment is effective immediately, and he will serve on the Board's Audit Committee.

feed.title: Drought watch in 21 Pa. counties: utility asks for 10-15% water cut
feed.summary: Pennsylvania American Water (NYSE:AWK) is asking customers in 21 Pennsylvania counties to voluntarily reduce nonessential water use by 10-15% due to an expanded drought watch declared by the Department of Environmental Protection. Although current water supplies are adequate, the company urges conservation to prepare for potentially worsening conditions. Customers are advised to use online resources and practical tips for water saving.

feed.title: ServiceNow stock price target lowered to $200 at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target for ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) to $200 from $230, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment comes ahead of the company's fourth-quarter earnings report, with TD Cowen citing confidence in cRPO performance and strategic M&A, particularly the Armis acquisition. Other firms like Morgan Stanley, Evercore ISI, Goldman Sachs, KeyBanc, and Stifel have also recently provided varied analyst assessments for ServiceNow.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp's (NASDAQ:FITB) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) reported Q4 CY2025 earnings, with revenue of $2.34 billion meeting Wall Street expectations and representing a 4.9% year-on-year increase. The company's GAAP profit per share of $1.04 exceeded analyst estimates by 4.9%. Despite a slight miss on net interest income, its tangible book value per share narrowly topped expectations, leading to a mixed but flat reaction on the stock market.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) who purchased securities between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025. This legal action follows Alexandria's reported below-expectation financial results for Q3 2025, which included a cut in full-year FFO guidance, lower occupancy rates, slower leasing, and a significant real estate impairment charge, leading to a substantial drop in the company's stock price. Investors have until January 26, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: DexCom Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) Combines Strong Fundamentals with Bullish Chart Pattern
feed.summary: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) demonstrates strong fundamentals with notable past and projected growth in sales and earnings, alongside excellent earnings power and fiscal stability. A bullish chart pattern, specifically a bull flag shape and positive near-term direction, suggests the market is beginning to recognize its underlying strength. This combination of strong business performance and favorable chart indicators posits DXCM as an attractive opportunity for investors seeking growth stocks at a potential turning point.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Bought by Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 72.4% in Q3, now holding 32,456 shares valued at $1.67 million. This move is part of a broader institutional accumulation, with 70.71% of BAC shares owned by institutional investors. Bank of America also reported strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings expectations with $0.98 EPS and $28.53 billion in revenue, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $59.74.

feed.title: Robinson Value Management Ltd. Invests $2.81 Million in Prologis, Inc. $PLD
feed.summary: Robinson Value Management Ltd. has acquired a new stake of 24,493 shares in Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) valued at $2.81 million, making it the 25th largest holding in their portfolio. Other institutional investors have also increased their positions in Prologis, with 93.5% of the stock owned by institutional investors. Prologis maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $132.31, despite a high dividend payout ratio of 117.78%.

feed.title: Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC Has $4.37 Million Holdings in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. by 37.8% in Q3, now holding 31,110 shares valued at approximately $4.37 million. Despite varied analyst ratings leading to a "Hold" consensus and a $161.32 price target, PepsiCo continues to pay a quarterly dividend, though its payout ratio is high at 108.17%. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the company.

feed.title: ONEOK, Inc. $OKE Stake Raised by St. James Investment Company LLC
feed.summary: St. James Investment Company LLC significantly increased its stake in ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) by 10,934.9% during Q3, now owning 354,771 shares valued at approximately $25.9 million, making it their 9th largest holding. Other major institutional investors like Norges Bank, First Eagle, Boston Partners, Vanguard, and Man Group also substantially increased their positions, bringing total institutional ownership to about 69.1%. ONEOK reported a slight beat on Q3 EPS and revenue, provided FY2025 guidance, and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an $88.14 price target.

feed.title: Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC Cuts Position in Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. ($MRK) by 68.1% in Q3, selling over 32,000 shares. Despite this, positive news regarding Merck's Keytruda combined with Moderna's vaccine for melanoma showed promising long-term results, potentially expanding Merck's oncology presence. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.85, but its Q4 EPS of $1.94 missed analyst estimates of $2.08.

feed.title: St. James Investment Company LLC Makes New $9.44 Million Investment in IDEX Corporation $IEX
feed.summary: St. James Investment Company LLC has made a new $9.44 million investment in IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX), acquiring 57,984 shares, which now represents 1.5% of its portfolio. Wall Street analysts currently rate IDEX as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $199.14. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.71 per share.
